decision_value: current public repo identity via git ls-remote; GitHub REST API was rate-limited

evidence: Raw README is reachable and states Diffence is code for NDSS 2025, a plug-and-play defense to enhance membership privacy of undefended and defended classifier models with diffusion models
decision_value: public code/paper surface could over-promote to diffusion privacy evidence

evidence: README instructs users to download pretrained diffusion model checkpoints from Google Drive and copy diff_models into cifar10/diff_defense/diff_models
decision_value: diffusion artifacts are external runtime dependencies, not public frozen score/response packets in the repo

evidence: README instructs users to download pretrained undefended/defended classifier models from Google Drive into final-all-models, e.g. cifar10/final-all-models/resnet/selena.pth.tar
decision_value: protected target is a classifier model, not an audited diffusion generator target

evidence: cifar10/evaluate_MIAs/evaluate_mia.sh generates outputs and runs dist_attack.py with and without --diff, saving results under ./results after execution
decision_value: metric-code rule could over-promote runtime-generated MIA results

evidence: cifar10/data_partition.py downloads CIFAR-10 and partitions data locally at runtime
decision_value: split/materialization is runtime-dependent for this check; no public row-bound score packet was observed

evidence: https://zenodo.org/api/records/13706131 records DOI 10.5281/zenodo.13706131 and one Diffence-master.zip code snapshot size=2133861 checksum=md5:3535eb087cba81de655767510d4c2506
decision_value: code-snapshot artifact exists but is not a row-score or response packet

evidence: No public defended/undefended logits, MIA score rows, ROC arrays, metric JSON, or no-training verifier were observed in the no-download public surface
decision_value: blocks admitted score/response evidence and external denominator promotion

evidence: The consumer target is classifier membership privacy with diffusion purification as a defense component, not per-sample membership inference against a diffusion generator response/score asset
Keep as classifier-defense consumer-boundary false-promotion exemplar only; do not admit, do not count as external denominator, and do not release compute
decision_value: use for weak-rule baseline tagging, not model/checkpoint/result reconstruction
